signUp.heading: Sign Up
signUp.body: Create your account using Google login or email. Anyone can join in just a few steps.

createProfile.heading: Create Your Profile
createProfile.uploadLine: Upload your profile photo and complete registration.

uploadPhoto.heading: Upload Your Photo
uploadPhoto.selectFace: Select a photo of your face
uploadPhoto.adjustSquare: Adjust it to fit within the square frame
uploadPhoto.chooseGallery: Choose the one you like → it will be saved in your gallery.

purchasePhotos.heading: Purchase Photos (Get Exposure Opportunities)
purchasePhotos.item2: Choose a market with available entries (entry > 0)
purchasePhotos.browse: Browse and buy a photo you like.
purchasePhotos.afterPurchaseBefore: After purchase, you will instantly receive
purchasePhotos.whyPurchaseBody: Buying other users' photo licenses gives you exposure opportunities to help sell your own photos.

sellPhotos.heading: Sell Your Photos
sellPhotos.item2: Select a market with available entries
sellPhotos.then1: Choose a photo from your gallery
sellPhotos.notifIntro: You'll receive real-time updates via notifications:

photoFusion.heading: Photo Fusion
photoFusion.afterComplete: After completion, you'll see the result.

checkResults.heading: Check Results
checkResults.lockyAfter: to unlock and view the score.

redeemGiftCards.heading: Redeem Gift Cards
redeemGiftCards.body1Before: Once your points reach a certain level, you can request a
redeemGiftCards.body2: Details will be sent to your registered email.

purchasePackages.ticket2: Number of entries depends on the market's base price
